title: RISK: Unhandled Err(..) on store.subscription_expiry in auth path
description: relay/src/ws.rs lines 132-137: store.subscription_expiry() can fail (DB error), but is called with .unwrap_or(None). The Err is silently swallowed and treated as 'not subscribed'. If the subscription table becomes corrupted, all users appear unsubscribed and lose relay access. A solo maintainer will not see the DB error in logs (no .context() or error logging) and will waste time investigating why subscriptions stopped working. Risk: silent DB failures degrade to broken access control.
close_reason: Fixed: added INTERNAL_ERROR (-32603) to rpc_errors; subscription_expiry/register_user errors now send error response and abort auth; all_users error disconnects and returns; try_set_nickname Err branch sends internal error response.
